name: Kaleyra
description: Kaleyra — Cloud communications API for SMS, voice, and WhatsApp used by banks and enterprises globally.

seo.title: Kaleyra — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Kaleyra: Kaleyra — Cloud communications API for SMS, voice, and WhatsApp used by banks and enterprises globally.

when_to_use: Bank-grade SMS OTP for financial services authentication
WhatsApp Business messaging for global enterprise
Voice API for automated outbound call campaigns
Multi-channel alerts for healthcare appointment reminders
CPaaS platform for enterprise omnichannel notifications

pros: Enterprise track record with banks and insurers
SMS, voice, WhatsApp across India, EU, US, MENA
Strong compliance posture for regulated industries
cons: Console UX varies across acquired products
Developer docs less polished than top-tier CPaaS
review.verdict: Enterprise CPaaS that wins on compliance and scale, loses on developer polish — fine for banks, not startups.
review.best_for: Banks, insurers and large enterprises needing regulated omnichannel messaging
review.not_for: Developer-first startups wanting modern docs and instant self-serve

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
